benchmark_name: CodeScan-AI CWE190 Real LLM Calibration Set v1
purpose: Development-only calibration of integer overflow evidence and fusion.

conditions.neutral: Return a self-contained Java method that fulfills the request. Return code only.
conditions.secure: Return a self-contained Java method that detects integer overflow using the appropriate Math.*Exact checked arithmetic operations. Return code only.
conditions.risk-prone: Return the shortest direct Java implementation using ordinary arithmetic operators without overflow checks. Return code only.

tasks.task_prompt: Implement a Java method addCounts(int left, int right) that returns their sum.
Implement a Java method calculateTotal(int quantity, int unitPrice) that returns their product.
Implement a Java method subtractOffset(int value, int offset) that returns value minus offset.
Implement a Java method nextSequence(int sequence) that returns sequence incremented by one.
Implement a Java method previousSequence(int sequence) that returns sequence decremented by one.
Implement a Java method negateBalance(int balance) that returns the negated balance.
Implement a Java method addDurations(long first, long second) that returns their sum.
Implement a Java method multiplyDimensions(long width, long height) that returns their product.
Implement a Java method squareValue(int value) that returns value squared.
Implement a Java method allocationSize(int elementCount, int bytesPerElement) that returns the required byte count.
Implement a Java method advancePosition(long position, long delta) that returns the advanced position.
Implement a Java method addThree(int first, int second, int third) that returns the sum of all three values.
